# Jangpm · Brand Spec (auto-generated)

> **Description:** Korean lecture/report deck — warm off-white base with restrained indigo accent.

## Color Tokens

| Token | Hex | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `--bg` | `#FAFAF9` | page background |
| `--surface` | `#FFFFFF` | card / container |
| `--surface-alt` | `#F5F5F4` | grouped block |
| `--text` | `#1A1A1A` | primary text |
| `--text-secondary` | `#6B7280` | body secondary |
| `--text-tertiary` | `#9CA3AF` | captions |
| `--border` | `#E5E7EB` | dividers / card edges |
| `--border-strong` | `#D4D4D4` | strong dividers |
| `--accent` | `#4633E3` | primary accent (use 1–2 events / slide) |
| `--accent-soft` | `#E8E5FC` | accent-tinted bg |
| `--accent-ink` | `#2E1FB3` | accent pressed |
| `--positive` | `#059669` | growth (data only) |
| `--negative` | `#E11D48` | decline (data only) |
| `--warning` | `#D97706` | caution (data only) |

## Typography

- **Font chain:** `'Pretendard', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Apple SD Gothic Neo', 'Malgun Gothic', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif`
- **Display** 56px / 800
- **Headline** 32px / 700
- **Title** 18.4px / 600
- **Body** 15.2px / 400
- **Caption** 12.8px / 500

## Voice

- **Tone:** editorial, analytical, declarative
- **POV:** third-person institutional
- **Register:** Korean lecture / report
- **Forbidden phrases:** "여러분", "당신", "저는"
- **GM style hint:** 선언형 한 문장. 슬라이드의 so-what 을 명확히 진술.

## Assets

- **Icon pack (default):** tabler-outline

- **Brand character:** `slide/assets/design-systems/jangpm/assets/jangpm-character.png`
